posts.author: rdeelen (Rohan)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi All,

I have started to use charts more and more, and often use Pie charts.
But I find the lay out particularly of the Pie Chart lacking in refinement.

I would love for the numbers, to be visible inside the pie chart and not in the legend.
It would make the data much easier to digest.

Screenshot 2022-10-26 at 15.18.38797×383 13.5 KB
